evidence_spans.span: A statistical model is a family of probability distributions indexed by an unknown parameter \(\theta\).

The score function is the derivative of the log-likelihood with respect to the parameter,

\[
s(\theta) = \nabla_{\theta}\ell(\theta).
\]

results.rationale: The Score Function Formula formalizes the Statistical Model by providing the derivative of the log-likelihood with respect to the parameter, which is defined in the context of the statistical model.
